positive: A minimalist, highly stylized geometric depiction of a roaring fox emerging from stylized, crystalline forest foliage. The fox should have a clean, sharp silhouette, rendered in high-contrast black and white linework with subtle pops of burnt orange and deep indigo. Composition must be centered, suitable for an apparel chest print. Use clean lines, thick outlines, and negative space artist style. Studio lighting, crisp edges, vectors art, kawaii gothic aesthetic, detailed linocut print style. Ideal for screen printing, seamless repeat pattern quality, high fidelity.
